course_description.overview: Ultra road cycling event circling the Lienzer Dolomites, summiting Monte Zoncolan and 6 high passes with extreme climbing.

key_segments.name: Monte Zoncolan
key_segments.description: Iconic summit climb featured in the SuperGiroDolomiti variant.

key_segments.name: 6 Passes
key_segments.description: Total of 6 mountain passes contributing to 5,060m elevation gain.

key_segments.name: Gailberg, Sattel, Kartitscher Sattel
key_segments.description: Key passes mentioned including Gailberg, Sattel, and Kartitscher Sattel.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Austria's oldest cycling marathon over 70 years; SuperGiroDolomiti is an extreme challenge with 218 km and 5,060m climbing, suitable for experienced endurance riders.

logistics.getting_there: Start and finish in Lienz; accessible by car, train to East Tyrol; late registration on-site June 13-14.
logistics.accommodation: Lienz offers hotels and guesthouses; book early for event weekend.
logistics.registration_details: Online via racetime.pro until June 10, 2026 (€95-145 depending on date); late registration €5 extra on-site or via RaceTimePro app; age 18+ for SuperGiro.
logistics.bike_logistics: Transponder required on bike; helmet mandatory; follow road traffic rules.
logistics.local_considerations: Sports medical exam recommended; team discounts for 10+ (10% off); Kaiserschmarren party and cyclists party on June 13.

final_verdict.one_liner: Legendary Austrian road ultra with epic Dolomites climbing and 70+ years of history.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Strong climbers and endurance road cyclists seeking a brutal multi-pass challenge.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, for the prestige, scenery, and sense of achievement in Europe's stunning Alps.
pro_tips: Arrive Saturday for pasta party and number pickup.
Check weather; high altitude passes can be cold.

youtube_data.search_query: Dolomitenradrundfahrt / SuperGiroDolomiti gran fondo cycling Lienz

videos.title: Dolomitenradrundfahrt 2011 - Lienz
videos.description: Am Pfingstsonntag ging die 24. Auflage der Dolomitenradrundfahrt in Lienz über die Bühne. Obwohl der Regen das Teilnehmerfeld schrumpfen ließ, nahmen rund 1000 Radler die Tour von Lienz über Kötschach-Mauthen, Maria Luggau, Kartitsch und Abfaltersbach in Angriff.

videos.title: g.s. stabiuzzo alla G.F. dolomiten lienz 14 giugno 2009
videos.description: la granfondo delle dolomiti di lienz (austria). dopo 112 km e 1850 mt. di dislivello fiumi di birra ti aspettano....assolutamente da rifare anche nel 2010.

videos.title: Highlights Maratona dles Dolomites - Enel 2025
videos.description:
Lüm. Light. 
The light of the rising sun, the light between the peaks, the light in the eyes of every rider. 
7964 hearts ignited, three legendary routes, one shared emotion.
We celebrated the light, outside and within. 

Every pedal stroke was a spark. Every finish line, a burst of pure energy.
The winners were those who gave their all. 
The real victory was lighting the road with heart.
This was the 38th Maratona dles Dolomites.
And from today, that light will never fade.

In 2026, we return, guided by a new word: Pesc. Peace.
Fragile. Powerful. Essential.
Let it lead us, toward kindness, toward calm, toward a better world.

Giulan de cör. 🌿
See you on July 5th, 2026.

videos.title: Slight chaos at Maratona dles Dolomites 2025
videos.description:
The Maratona dles Dolomites (Ladin for "Dolomites Marathon"; Italian: Maratona delle Dolomiti), is an annual single-day road bicycle race covering seven mountain passes in the Dolomites. Open to amateur cyclists, the Maratona—with 9,000 riders chosen from 30,000 applicants,[1] from over 70 nations—is one of the biggest Italian Granfondo bicycle races.[2][3] National Geographic described it as "one of the biggest, most passionate, and most chaotic bike races on Earth."[4]

Date First week in July
Region Trentino-South Tyrol, Italy
Nickname(s) Maratona dles Dolomites
Discipline Road
Type Granfondo: Single-day race
Organiser Maratona dles Dolomites Committee
Race director Michil Costa

rider_intel.search_text: The provided transcript from the Dolomitenradrundfahrt / SuperGiroDolomiti video does not contain race-specific content or rider commentary about the event. The transcript appears to consist primarily of song lyrics and music rather than actionable intelligence about this 135-mile gravel race through East Tyrol, Austria. No information about course conditions, terrain characteristics, key challenges, gear recommendations, or race strategy was found in the available material. Additional video content with actual race commentary would be needed to provide meaningful rider intelligence for this challenging Alpine gravel event.
